subcodes.first_line: The call hath been raised, the Mother Book revealed, the Path made manifest, yet the people are beheld in evident error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندآء مرتفع ام الکتاب نازل صراط مشهود ولکن قوم در ضلال مبین مشاهده می شوند
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for protection
